word: H8257 - שָׁקַע - shâqaʻ - shaw-kah' - Make deep

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁקע

Transliteration: shâqa‛

Phonetic: shaw-kah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sink, sink down, subside
    1. (Qal) to sink
    2. (Niphal) to sink, collapse
    3. (Hiphil) to sink down, cause to settle

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2456

Part(s) of speech: Verb
